These plants are non-vascular, meaning they lack a vascular system to transport water and nutrients. The family Staphyladaceae is part of the larger division Marchantiophyta, which includes a wide range of liverwort species. Ozomelis diversifolia, being a member of this family, falls under the class Marchantiopsida. This classification is based on the plant's unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other liverwort species.
